# distance

**Data field**

The distance between the source node and the destination node.

## Data fields

- **majorVersion**: The major version number of the file format.
- **minorVersion**: The minor version number of the file format.
- **toNodeID**: The ID of the destination node.
- **fromValidFlags**: A set of flags that indicate which source node view settings are valid.
- **fromPan**: The preferred from-pan angle at the source node.
- **fromTilt**: The preferred from-tilt angle at the source node.
- **fromFOV**: The preferred from-field of view at the source node.
- **fromViewCenter**: The preferred from-view center at the source node.
- **toValidFlags**: A set of flags that indicate which destination node view settings are valid.
- **toPan**: The pan angle to use when displaying the destination node.
- **toTilt**: The tilt angle to use when displaying the destination node.
- **toFOV**: The field of view to use when displaying the destination node.
- **toViewCenter**: The view center to use when displaying the destination node.
- **flags**: A set of link hot spot flags.
- **reserved1**: Reserved.
